title: Accusé de réception de l'instrument français (mail)
text_preview: BACCARINI Isabelle De: Envoyé: À: Cc: Objet: Yelisseeva, Yvonna < YelisseY@ebrd.com> vendredi 3 mars 2023 11:46 LALLIER Stéphanie Genuardi, Jane (Calogera) RE: Transmission from the French Embassy [OU] ***[EMETTEUR EXTERNE] : Ne cliquez sur aucun lien et n'ouvrez aucune pièce jointe à moins qu'ils ne proviennent d'un expéditeur fiable, ou que vous ayez l'assurance que le contenu provient d'une source sûre*** OFFICIA…

pages.text:
BACCARINI Isabelle

De:

Envoyé:

À:

Cc:

Objet:

Yelisseeva, Yvonna < YelisseY@ebrd.com> vendredi 3 mars 2023 11:46

LALLIER Stéphanie

Genuardi, Jane (Calogera)

RE: Transmission from the French Embassy [OU]

***[EMETTEUR EXTERNE] : Ne cliquez sur aucun lien et n'ouvrez aucune pièce jointe à moins qu'ils ne proviennent d'un expéditeur fiable, ou que vous ayez l'assurance que le contenu provient d'une source sûre***

OFFICIAL USE

Dear Stéphanie,

Thank you for arranging delivery of the documents to the EBRD on 2 March. This is to confirm receipt. I have passed them to our Legal Department this morning.

Kind regards,

Yvonna Yelisseeva

Executive Assistant

EBRD - President's Office 5 Bank Street, London, E14 4BG

Tel: +44 (0)207 338 6260

Mobile: +44 (0)788 454 9164 yelissey@ebrd.com

We invest in changing lives

From: LALLIER Stéphanie <stephanie.lallier@diplomatie.gouv.fr>

Sent: 03 March 2023 10:28

To: Yelisseeva, Yvonna < YelisseY@ebrd.com>

Cc: Genuardi, Jane (Calogera) < GenuardJ@ebrd.com>

Subject: RE: Transmission from the French Embassy [OU]

CAUTION: External Email. Do you know the sender? Consider whether the email is safe before opening links or attachments. If in doubt, contact the IT Service Desk.

Dear Yvonna,

Can you please ackowledge receipt of the original document stating the date you received the document?

I need to send a written confirmation to the Ministry of Europe and Foreign Affairs in Paris.

Many thanks,

Best regards,

Stephanie

Stéphanie Lallier ecretaire du Ministre Conseiller M. Gerrit van Rossum | Secretary of the Deputy Head of Mission Mr. Gerrit van Rossu mbassade de France au Royaume-Uni | French Embassy in the United Kingdor 58 Knightsbridge - London SWIX 7JT - United Kingdom

https://uk.ambafrance.org/

AMBASSADE

DE FRANCE

AU ROYAUME-UNI

De : Yelisseeva, Yvonna [mailto:YelisseY@ebrd.coml

Envoyé : mercredi 1 mars 2023 17:23

À : LALLIER Stéphanie <stephanie.lallier@diplomatie.gouv.fr>

Cc: Genuardi, Jane (Calogera) <Genuard@ebrd.com>

Objet: Re: Transmission from the French Embassy [OU]

***[EMETTEUR EXTERNEJ: Ne cliquez sur aucun lien et n'ouvrez aucune pièce jointe à moins qu'ils ne proviennent d'un expéditeur fiable, ou que vous ayez l'assurance que le contenu provient d'une source sûre***

Dear Stephanie,

Certainly! 10:30 will work fine. May I please ask your colleague to give me a call when he arrives, or I can wait in the lobby at 10.30.

Best regards,

Yvonna

Sent from Outlook for ios

From: LALLIER Stéphanie <stephanie. lallier@diplomatie.gouv.fr>

Sent: Wednesday, March 1, 2023 4:41:13 PM

To: Yelisseeva, Yvonna <YelisseY@ebrd.com>

Cc: Genuardi, Jane (Calogera) < Genuards@ebrd.com>

Subject: RE: Transmission from the French Embassy [OU]

CAUTION: External Email. Do you know the sender? Consider whether the email is safe before opening links or attachments. If in doubt, contact the IT Service Desk.

Dear Yvonna,

As per previous emails, I would like to check if a driver could come by your office tomorrow to deliver the original hard copies?

Is any time after 10h30 a good time?

Many thanks

Kind regards

Stephanie Lallier

Secretaire du Ministre Conseiller M. Gerrit van Rossum | Secretary of the Deputy Head of Mission Mr. Gerrit van Rossum

Ambassade de France au Royaume-Uni | French Embassy in the United Kinadom 58 Knightsbridge - London SW1X 7JT - United Kingdom https://uk.ambafrance.org/

AMBASSADE

DE FRANCE

AU ROYAUME-UNI

De: Genuardi, Jane (Calogera) [mailto:Genuard/@ebrd.com/

Envoyé : lundi 27 février 2023 11:26

À : LONDRES-AMBA Sec <sec.londres-amba@diplomatie.gouv.fr>

Cc: LALLIER Stéphanie' ‹stephanie lallier@diplomatie.gouv.fr>; Yelisseeva, Yvonna < YelisseY@ebrd.com>

Objet : RE: Transmission from the French Embassy [OU]

***[EMETTEUR EXTERNE] : Ne cliquez sur aucun lien et n'ouvrez aucune pièce jointe à moiris qu'ils ne proviennent d'un expéditeur fiable, ou que vous ayez l'assurance que le contenu provient d'une source sûre***,

OFFICIAL USE

Thanks Gabriel

Many thanks for your kind response

My colleague Yvonna will be in the office on Thursday, if the driver can come from 10am that would be most helpful

Yvonna can be contacted on 020 7 338 6260

Kind regards

Jane

Jane Genuardi

Personal Assistant to President Renaud-Basso

President's Office

EBRD

5 Bank Street,

London, E14 4BG

Tel: + 44 (0) 207 338 8548

Email: GenuardJ@ebrd.com

From: CANFAILLA Gabriel <gabriel.canfailla@diplomatie.gouv.fr> On Behalf Of LONDRES-AMBA Sec

Sent: 27 February 2023 11:05

To: Genuardi, Jane (Calogera) <GenuardJ@ebrd.com>

Cc: 'LONDRES-AMBA Sec' <sec.londres-amba@diplomatie.gouv.fr>; 'LALLIER Stéphanie' <stephanie.lallier@diplomatie.gouv.fr

Subject: RE: Transmission from the French Embassy [OU]

CAUTION: External Email. Do you know the sender? Consider whether the email is safe before opening links or attachments. If in doubt, contact the IT Service Desk.

Dear Jane,

Stéphanie being out of office today, I confirm delivery for Thursday 2 March.

we will get back with a time frame on Thursday morning.

Best regards

Gabriel CANFAILLA - Linda DUREL

Assistants de l'Ambassadrice | Ambassador's PA

Ambassade de France au Royaume-Uni | French Embassy in the United Kingdom

58 Knightsbridge, London SW1X 7JT www uk ambafrance.org

E

AMBASSADE

DE FRANCE

AU ROYAUME-UNI

De : Genuardi, Jane (Calogera) [mailto:Genuard]@ebrd.com]

Envoyé : samedi 25 février 2023 09:48

À : LALLIER Stéphanie <stephanie lallier@diplomatie.gouv.fr>

Ce : 'LONDRES-AMBA Sec' <sec.londres-amba @diplomatie.gouv.fr>

Objet : RE: Transmission from the French Embassy [OU]

***[EMETTEUR EXTERNE] : Ne cliquez sur aucun lien et n'ouvrez aucune pièce jointe à moins qu'ils ne proviennent d'un expéditeur fiable, ou que vous ayez l'assurance que le contenu provient d'une source sûre***,

OFFICIAL USE

Dear Stephanie

Many thanks for your kind email, unfortunately there will be no colleagues to receive the hard copies,

My colleague will be in the office on Thursday 2 March, if this is acceptable to yourselves.

Kind regards jane

Jane Genuardi

Personal Assistant to President Renaud-Basso

President's Office

EBRD

5 Bank Street,

London, E14 4BG

Tel: + 44 (0) 207 338 8548

Email: GenuardJ@ebrd.com

From: LALLIER Stéphanie <stephanie lallier@diplomatie.gouv.fr>

Sent: 24 February 2023 17:45

To: Genuardi, Jane (Calogera) <Genuardi@ebrd.com>

Cc: 'LONDRES-AMBA Sec’ <sec londres-amba @diplomatie gouv.fr>

Subject: Transmission from the French Embassy

CAUTION: External Email. Do you know the sender? Consider whether the email is safe before opening links or attachments. If in doubt, contact the IT Service Desk,

Dear Jane,

Regarding my previous message, a driver will come to your office on Monday morning to drop off the original documents.

Here is his detail : Mr Mariusz Cybulski (+447764660312 )

He will probably come by around 10 :30am.

Many thanks,

With best regards,

Stéphanie Lallier

Secrétaire du Ministre Conseiller M. Gerrit van Rossum | Secretary of the Deputy Head of Mission Mr. Gerrit van Rossum

Ambassade de France au Royaume-Uni | French Embassy in the United Kingdom 58 Knightsbridge - London SW1X 7JT - United Kingdom

Tél : +44(0)20 7073 1046 https://uk.ambafrance.org/

AMBASSADE

DE FRANCE

AU ROYAUME-UNI
